Summary: Sanas Mobile: In-App Live Voice Call (iOS + Android)
Description: Focused React Native app (iOS + Android): an in-app voice call where the user hears their voice through a Sanas model in real time, with mid-call model on/off and live switching. Reuses the web backend (/api/twilio/*). Out of scope: chatbot, RAG, uploads, dial-out/IVR/bridge. See docs/PRD.md and docs/mockup.html.

Enabler: Sanas SDK in real mode; Twilio browser-voice configured (TWILIO_API_KEY_SID/SECRET, TWILIO_TWIML_APP_SID, PUBLIC_BASE_URL); TwiML App Voice URL = {PUBLIC_BASE_URL}/api/twilio/voice; stable public URL. AC: /api/health mode:real; /api/twilio/config browser_voice:true; token returns; reachable over HTTPS from a device.

React Native (TS) single call screen: model picker, Call/Hang-up, timer, Model on/off, light/dark. Already implemented in the repo (App.tsx, src/). AC: builds and renders in light/dark; model list loads from /api/models.

Summary: Twilio Voice: token + outgoing connect (audible call)
Description: Integrate @twilio/voice-react-native-sdk; on Call fetch a token and connect({mode:'sanas',model}); play audio; capture CallSid. AC: connects in ~5s and audio is audible; CallSid captured on connect; disconnect resets the UI.

iOS NSMicrophoneUsageDescription prompt on first use; Android RECORD_AUDIO runtime request before connecting; graceful denial handling. AC: mic prompt appears on both platforms; denial shows a recoverable message and the app stays usable.

Call button brand-dark when idle, spinner while connecting, green while connected; live mm:ss timer; Hang-up enabled only during a call. AC: states match the mockup; timer starts on connect and resets on hang-up.

Model on/off via POST /api/twilio/toggle {call_sid, enabled} during the call. AC: Model off audibly returns the raw line and Model on restores processing; the call does not drop; controls enabled only while connected.

Tapping a different model chip while connected POSTs /api/twilio/toggle {call_sid, model}. AC: switching changes the audio without dropping the call; selecting a model while idle sets the model for the next call.

Audio session handling on both platforms: earpiece/speaker/Bluetooth routing, echo, OS-call interruptions, silent switch. AC: audible on earpiece and speaker, works with a Bluetooth headset, no persistent echo, recovers after an interruption.

Handle connect failure, mid-call network loss/reconnect, app background/foreground, and token/endpoint errors. AC: connect failure resets to idle with a message; backgrounding during a call keeps audio (background modes) or ends gracefully.
Final app name, bundle id (ai.sanas.*), 1024px icon, splash, light/dark polish, store screenshots. AC: icon and splash on both platforms; name and bundle id set.
Signing/provisioning, version bump, Archive, distribute to App Store Connect. AC: installs from TestFlight and completes a call.
applicationId, release keystore, gradlew bundleRelease, upload .aab to Play Console. AC: installs from Play internal testing and completes a call.
